sentence: 她晚饭后喜欢喝一杯红酒。
pinyin: Tā wǎnfàn hòu xǐhuān hē yī bēi hóngjiǔ.
english: She likes to have a glass of red wine after dinner.

sentence: 请大家按号码就座。
pinyin: Qǐng dàjiā àn hàomǎ jiùzuò.
english: Please take your seats according to your number.

meaning: To reach out with one's hand
sentence: 他伸手把架子上的书拿了下来。
pinyin: Tā shēn shǒu bǎ jiàzi shàng de shū ná le xiàlái.
english: He reached out and took the book off the shelf.

meaning: 1. to hype; 2. to promote (in the media)
sentence: 这部电影上映前被媒体大量炒作。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng shàngyìng qián bèi méitǐ dàliàng chǎozuò.
english: This movie was heavily hyped by the media before its release.

meaning: 1. to work in a profession (e.g. doctor, lawyer); 2. practitioner; 3.
sentence: 他通过考试后正式开始执业。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò kǎoshì hòu zhèngshì kāishǐ zhíyè.
english: He officially started practicing his profession after passing the exam.

meaning: 1. to abridge (a text); 2. to edit out (of a movie); 3. to cut back (a
sentence: 这部电影在上映时被删减了一些内容。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng zài shàngyìng shí bèi shānjiǎn le yīxiē nèiróng.
english: Some content was cut from this film when it was released.

sentence: 这是一所综合性大学，学科很齐全。
pinyin: Zhè shì yī suǒ zōnghéxìng dàxué, xuékē hěn qíquán.
english: This is a comprehensive university with a wide range of academic disciplines.

sentence: 她今年刚晋升为副教授。
pinyin: Tā jīnnián gāng jìnshēng wéi fùjiàoshòu.
english: She was just promoted to associate professor this year.

meaning: 1. sales figure; 2. total income from sales; 3. turnover
sentence: 这个季度的销售额比去年增加了不少。
pinyin: Zhège jìdù de xiāoshòu é bǐ qùnián zēngjiā le bù shǎo.
english: This quarter's sales figures increased quite a bit compared to last year.

sentence: 他是这次市长选举的候选人之一。
pinyin: Tā shì zhè cì shìzhǎng xuǎnjǔ de hòuxuǎn rén zhī yī.
english: He is one of the candidates in this mayoral election.

meaning: increase step by step; steadily increase
sentence: 这份清单按价格递增排列。
pinyin: Zhè fèn qīngdān àn jiàgé dìzēng páiliè.
english: This list is arranged in order of increasing price.

meaning: 1. to see through; 2. perspective; 3. to examine by fluoroscopy (i.e.
sentence: 医生给他做了胸部透视检查。
pinyin: Yīshēng gěi tā zuò le xiōngbù tòushì jiǎnchá.
english: The doctor performed a chest X-ray examination on him.

sentence: 请按照医嘱控制好用药剂量。
pinyin: Qǐng ànzhào yīzhǔ kòngzhì hǎo yòngyào jìliàng.
english: Please control the medication dosage according to the doctor's instructions.

sentence: 多运动有助于加快新陈代谢。
pinyin: Duō yùndòng yǒu zhù yú jiākuài xīnchén dàixiè.
english: Exercising more helps speed up your metabolism.

sentence: 他租了一艘游艇在海湾游玩。
pinyin: Tā zū le yī sōu yóutǐng zài hǎiwān yóuwán.
english: He rented a yacht to cruise around the bay.

sentence: 警察给嫌疑人戴上了手铐。
pinyin: Jǐngchá gěi xiányírén dài shàng le shǒukào.
english: The police put handcuffs on the suspect.

sentence: 博物馆里展出了一颗旧式手榴弹模型。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchū le yī kē jiùshì shǒuliúdàn móxíng.
english: A model of an old-style hand grenade is on display at the museum.

meaning: 1. lotus flower (Nelumbo nucifera Gaertn, among others); 2. water-lily
sentence: 池塘里开满了粉色的莲花。
pinyin: Chítáng lǐ kāi mǎn le fěnsè de liánhuā.
english: The pond is covered in pink lotus flowers in bloom.

sentence: 他把电脑的各个组件重新安装了一遍。
pinyin: Tā bǎ diànnǎo de gège zǔjiàn chóngxīn ānzhuāng le yī biàn.
english: He reinstalled all the computer components one by one.

sentence: 这门技艺出现了传承上的断层。
pinyin: Zhè mén jìyì chūxiàn le chuánchéng shàng de duàncéng.
english: There is a gap in the transmission of this traditional craft.

sentence: 他出其不意地提前回到了家。
pinyin: Tā chūqí bùyì de tíqián huí dào le jiā.
english: He unexpectedly came home early.

meaning: 1. (of a large number of things) to form an expanse; 2. to cover an ar
sentence: 春天一到，花园里的郁金香成片地开放。
pinyin: Chūntiān yī dào, huāyuán lǐ de yùjīnxiāng chéngpiàn de kāifàng.
english: When spring arrives, the tulips in the garden bloom in great swaths.

sentence: 老师给我们列出了一份推荐书目。
pinyin: Lǎoshī gěi wǒmen lièchū le yī fèn tuījiàn shūmù.
english: The teacher gave us a list of recommended books.

sentence: 他卸任后回到了家乡生活。
pinyin: Tā xièrèn hòu huí dào le jiāxiāng shēnghuó.
english: After leaving office, he returned to his hometown to live.

sentence: 她把书本整齐地放在书架上。
pinyin: Tā bǎ shūběn zhěngqí de fàng zài shūjià shàng.
english: She neatly arranged the books on the bookshelf.

sentence: 彩虹展示了可见光的光谱。
pinyin: Cǎihóng zhǎnshì le kějiànguāng de guāngpǔ.
english: A rainbow displays the spectrum of visible light.

sentence: 他们的恋情是从大学开始的。
pinyin: Tāmen de liànqíng shì cóng dàxué kāishǐ de.
english: Their romance started back in college.

sentence: 这种病的死亡率已经大幅下降。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng bìng de sǐwánglǜ yǐjīng dàfú xiàjiàng.
english: The mortality rate for this disease has dropped significantly.

sentence: 双方同意立即停火。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng tóngyì lìjí tínghuǒ.
english: Both sides agreed to an immediate ceasefire.

sentence: 他从手机里移除了几个不用的应用。
pinyin: Tā cóng shǒujī lǐ yíchú le jǐ ge bùyòng de yìngyòng.
english: He removed a few unused apps from his phone.

sentence: 我想提请大家注意这个问题。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng tíqǐng dàjiā zhùyì zhège wèntí.
english: I'd like to propose that everyone pay attention to this issue.

meaning: 1. as before; 2. as usual; 3. (to be) like old friends
sentence: 多年没见，我们见面后却一见如故。
pinyin: Duō nián méi jiàn, wǒmen jiànmiàn hòu què yī jiàn rú gù.
english: We hadn't seen each other in years, but we clicked instantly like old friends.

sentence: 我需要重设一下路由器才能上网。
pinyin: Wǒ xūyào chóngshè yīxià lùyóuqì cái néng shàngwǎng.
english: I need to reset the router to get back online.

meaning: 1. to reply officially to a subordinate
sentence: 申请已经得到上级的批复。
pinyin: Shēnqǐng yǐjīng dédào shàngjí de pīfù.
english: The application has received approval from the higher authorities.

sentence: 医院里有很多新生儿在哭。
pinyin: Yīyuàn lǐ yǒu hěn duō xīnshēng'ér zài kū.
english: There are many newborns crying in the hospital.

sentence: 她在大学学的是生物工程专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xué de shì shēngwùgōngchéng zhuānyè.
english: She studied bioengineering as her major in college.

sentence: 他找到了一个可靠的合伙人一起开店。
pinyin: Tā zhǎodào le yī ge kěkào de héhuǒrén yīqǐ kāi diàn.
english: He found a reliable partner to open a shop together.

meaning: to assemble (the finished product); final assembly
sentence: 这台设备的总装工作在工厂完成。
pinyin: Zhè tái shèbèi de zǒng zhuāng gōngzuò zài gōngchǎng wánchéng.
english: The final assembly of this equipment is done at the factory.

sentence: 十九世纪末，列强纷纷在中国设立租界。
pinyin: Shíjiǔ shìjì mò, liè qiáng fēnfēn zài Zhōngguó shèlì zūjiè.
english: At the end of the 19th century, the Great Powers one after another set up concessions in China.

sentence: 这份报纸专门出了一个海外版给海外华人看。
pinyin: Zhè fèn bàozhǐ zhuānmén chū le yī gè hǎi wài bǎn gěi hǎiwài Huárén kàn.
english: This newspaper published a special overseas edition for overseas Chinese readers.

sentence: 我想把余额宝里的钱提现到银行卡。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng bǎ Yú'é Bǎo lǐ de qián tí xiàn dào yínháng kǎ.
english: I want to withdraw the money in my Yu'e Bao to my bank card.

meaning: stern or displeased expression; to show such an expression
sentence: 老板开会时突然黑脸，大家都不敢说话了。
pinyin: Lǎobǎn kāihuì shí tūrán hēi liǎn, dàjiā dōu bù gǎn shuōhuà le.
english: The boss suddenly turned sour during the meeting and no one dared to speak.

sentence: 他年轻时曾是一名优秀的国脚。
pinyin: Tā niánqīng shí céng shì yī míng yōuxiù de guó jiǎo.
english: He was an excellent national football team player when he was young.

sentence: 离开多年后，他依然思念故国的山水。
pinyin: Líkāi duō nián hòu, tā yīrán sīniàn gù guó de shānshuǐ.
english: Even after many years abroad, he still missed the landscapes of his homeland.

sentence: 公司今年招了五名实习生来帮忙。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián zhāo le wǔ míng shí xí shēng lái bāngmáng.
english: The company hired five interns this year to help out.

sentence: 他的绩效考核结果很好，今年奖金不少。
pinyin: Tā de jì xiào kǎohé jiéguǒ hěn hǎo, jīnnián jiǎngjīn bùshǎo.
english: His performance review results were excellent, so his bonus this year is quite good.

sentence: 这款软件是商用版本，需要付费授权。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn ruǎnjiàn shì shāng yòng bǎnběn, xūyào fùfèi shòuquán.
english: This software is the commercial version and requires a paid license.

meaning: to be suffering from an illness (often implying "in spite of being sic
sentence: 他带病坚持来参加了婚礼。
pinyin: Tā dài bìng jiānchí lái cānjiā le hūnlǐ.
english: He pushed through his illness and came to attend the wedding.

sentence: 酒后驾车会触犯法律。
pinyin: Jiǔ hòu jiàchē huì chùfàn fǎlǜ.
english: Drunk driving violates the law.

sentence: 双方就合同细节进行了磋商。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng jiù hétong xìjié jìnxíngle cuōshāng.
english: The two sides consulted each other on the details of the contract.
